name: Adversary Village
bio: Offensive security community focused on adversary simulation, purple teaming, and nation-state threat actor research.

name: MITRE ATT&CK
bio: Global knowledge base of adversary tactics and techniques. Primary data source for technique mappings and group profiles.

name: MITRE CTID
bio: Center for Threat-Informed Defense. Provides Attack Flow framework and adversary emulation libraries used throughout this project.

name: Community Contributors
bio: Open-source contributors who submit threat actor profiles, verify IOCs, and improve detection engineering content via GitHub pull requests.
